description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image, define APT_CACHE_DIR and CARGO_HOME variables pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/apt and $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, and cache the apt/, cargo/, and target/ directories. Define three stages: test, doc, and build. In the test stage add a test job that runs rustc --version, cargo --version, and cargo test --verbose. In the doc stage add a pages job that runs cargo doc --no-deps, moves target/doc to a public directory, creates an index.html redirect with echo '<meta http-equiv=\"refresh\" content=\"0; url=soup/index.html\">' > public/index.html, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. The build stage is reserved for future jobs but has no jobs defined currently.
